name: star-destroyer
description: Procedural Star Destroyer built from raw Three.js geometry

commands.code: AFRAME.registerComponent("star-destroyer",{init(){const g=this.el.object3D;const hullMat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x8899aa,roughness:0.6,metalness:0.7,flatShading:true});const darkMat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x556677,roughness:0.5,metalness:0.8,flatShading:true});const detailMat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x667788,roughness:0.4,metalness:0.9,flatShading:true});const glowMat=new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x4488ff,transparent:true,opacity:0.7});const engineMat=new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x88bbff,transparent:true,opacity:0.9});/* MAIN HULL WEDGE */var hullGeo=new THREE.BufferGeometry();var v=new Float32Array([0,0,-5,-2.2,-0.1,2.5,2.2,-0.1,2.5,0,0.15,-4.5,-1.8,0.5,2.5,1.8,0.5,2.5]);var idx=[0,2,1,3,4,5,0,3,5,0,5,2,0,1,4,0,4,3,1,2,5,1,5,4];var indices=new Uint16Array(idx);hullGeo.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(v,3));hullGeo.setIndex(new THREE.BufferAttribute(indices,1));hullGeo.computeVertexNormals();var hull=new THREE.Mesh(hullGeo,hullMat);g.add(hull);/* HULL SURFACE TRENCHES */for(var i=-3;i<=1;i+=0.8){var tw=1.0+((i+5)/7.5)*2.0;var trench=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(tw,0.06,0.08),darkMat);trench.position.set(0,0.32+((i+5)/7.5)*0.15,i);g.add(trench);}/* HULL PANEL LINES - lengthwise */for(var s=-1;s<=1;s+=2){for(var j=0;j<3;j++){var pLen=4.0-j*0.8;var px=s*(0.3+j*0.4);var panel=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.03,0.04,pLen),detailMat);panel.position.set(px,0.3+j*0.03,-1+j*0.3);g.add(panel);}}/* BRIDGE TOWER */var towerBase=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9,0.6,0.5),darkMat);towerBase.position.set(0,0.8,1.8);g.add(towerBase);var towerMid=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.6,0.4,0.35),detailMat);towerMid.position.set(0,1.2,1.8);g.add(towerMid);var towerTop=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.4,0.2,0.25),hullMat);towerTop.position.set(0,1.5,1.8);g.add(towerTop);/* BRIDGE WINDOWS */var bridgeWin=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.35,0.06,0.01),glowMat);bridgeWin.position.set(0,1.55,1.65);g.add(bridgeWin);/* COMMAND BRIDGE PYLONS */for(var s=-1;s<=1;s+=2){var pylon=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08,0.9,0.12),darkMat);pylon.position.set(s*0.35,0.95,1.85);g.add(pylon);}/* SHIELD GENERATOR DOMES */for(var s=-1;s<=1;s+=2){var dome=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.1,8,6),detailMat);dome.position.set(s*0.25,1.65,1.8);g.add(dome);}/* ENGINES - 3 main thrusters at rear */for(var i=-1;i<=1;i++){var engineHousing=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5,0.35,0.15),darkMat);engineHousing.position.set(i*0.6,0.2,2.55);g.add(engineHousing);var thruster=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.35,0.2,0.05),engineMat);thruster.position.set(i*0.6,0.2,2.6);g.add(thruster);}/* ENGINE GLOW */var engineGlow=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(2.2,0.5),new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x4488ff,transparent:true,opacity:0.15,side:THREE.DoubleSide,blending:THREE.AdditiveBlending,depthWrite:false}));engineGlow.position.set(0,0.2,2.7);g.add(engineGlow);/* HANGAR BAY - underside */var hangar=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8,0.06,0.6),new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0xddaa44,transparent:true,opacity:0.3}));hangar.position.set(0,-0.08,0.5);g.add(hangar);/* HULL GREEBLE DETAILS - small boxes */for(var i=0;i<20;i++){var gx=(Math.random()-0.5)*2.5;var gz=-3+Math.random()*4.5;var maxW=((gz+5)/7.5)*2.0;if(Math.abs(gx)>maxW*0.4)continue;var greeble=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08+Math.random()*0.1,0.04+Math.random()*0.04,0.08+Math.random()*0.1),detailMat);greeble.position.set(gx,0.35+Math.random()*0.05,gz);g.add(greeble);}/* RUNNING LIGHTS */var colors=[0xff0000,0x00ff00,0x4488ff];for(var i=0;i<3;i++){var light=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.03,6,6),new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:colors[i]}));light.position.set(i===0?-1.5:i===1?1.5:0,0.1,i===2?-4.5:1.5);g.add(light);}},tick(){this.el.object3D.rotation.y+=0.001;}});var el=document.createElement("a-entity");el.setAttribute("star-destroyer","");el.setAttribute("position","18 10 -30");el.setAttribute("rotation","5 -30 2");el.setAttribute("scale","3 3 3");document.querySelector("a-scene").appendChild(el);console.log("[hot-swap] star-destroyer injected");
